stemHtml: During taxi: "All stations, ATHINAI Ground, CPDLC failure, standby for Ground 121.750". What is ATC communicating?

options.a: Complete CPDLC failure — contact Ground on 121.750.
options.b: Single CPDLC message failure — contact Ground on 121.750.
options.c: Complete CPDLC failure — wait to be called by Ground.
options.d: Single CPDLC message failure — wait to be called by Ground.
